name: Jilin Jlu Communication Design Institute Co., Ltd
summary: Jilin Jlu Communication Design Institute Co., Ltd provides survey, design, and consulting services for communication engineering projects in China, Iran, Malaysia, and internationally. The company undertakes planning, feasibility study, evaluation, program design, project proposal, technical specification, optimization and technical consultation, and technology research and development in the field of communication. It serves clients in the communications, electricity, water conservancy, transportation, public security, banking, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Changchun Telecommunications Engineering Design Institute Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jilin Jlu Communication Design Institute Co., Ltd in May 2010. Jilin Jlu Communication Design Institute Co., Ltd was founded in 1985 and is based in Changchun, China.
